message:
fix(ui): use draw_rect_filled for overlay backgrounds to prevent text bleed-through (#99)

Four overlays (Inspector, Saved-Views, Export, Bulk Actions) used
Block::new().style(bg_style).render() which only sets background color
without clearing foreground text, causing content from underlying panes
to bleed through. Replace with frame.draw_rect_filled() which overwrites
both characters and styles, matching the pattern already used by the
help overlay.

Closes #99

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
